EmailTemplate.description: Email to use for leads at the fifth attempt stage.
EmailTemplate.name: Opportunity – 5th Attempt
EmailTemplate.subject: Still interested in business insurance?
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
I’m following up on my previous attempts to move forward with your business insurance.
I understand that there can be many reasons why you may not be interested right now, and I wanted to check if any of these apply to you.
Current policy not due to expire? If you let me know your expiry date for your business insurance policy, I can give you a call nearer the time to arrange a new quote.
Want no further contact? If you are not interested in moving forward, just let me know and I will ensure I don’t contact you again.
Alternatively, if you are still interested in proceeding, reply with the best date and time for me to call you. Alternatively, you can give me a ring on 01242 808 740.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Sales Team
E: salesteam@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808740
